legal.terms_s1_body: Overglow Trip is a booking platform for tourism experiences in Morocco. These terms govern access and use by travelers, operators and admins.
legal.terms_s2_body: You are responsible for keeping your credentials confidential. Information provided must be accurate. Overglow may suspend accounts in case of fraud.
legal.terms_s3_li1: A booking is confirmed only after validated card payment or manual validation (bank transfer / cash).
legal.terms_s3_li2: Displayed prices include taxes shown on the product page.
legal.terms_s3_li3: Cancellation policies are specific to each experience and shown before payment.
legal.terms_s4_body: Operators commit to delivering experiences as described and respecting capacity and schedules.
legal.terms_s5_body: Overglow acts as a technical intermediary. Delivery of the experience is the operator's responsibility, within applicable law.

how_it_works.title: How it works
how_it_works.subtitle: Overglow Trip connects travelers and local operators to book tourism experiences in minutes.
how_it_works.step1_text: Browse authentic experiences across Morocco: cities, categories, dates and filters.
how_it_works.step2_text: Pick an available slot, number of travelers, then confirm your details.
how_it_works.step3_text: Card for automatic confirmation, or bank transfer / cash with Overglow validation.
how_it_works.step4_text: Receive your confirmation, contact your operator if needed, and enjoy the experience.

faq_page.title: FAQ
faq_page.subtitle: Answers to the most frequent questions.

footer.tagline: Authentic experiences in Morocco, carefully curated.

home.hero_subtitle: Discover unforgettable experiences and exceptional stays selected for you.
home.feature_local_desc: Based in Morocco, we curate every activity.
home.feature_cancel_desc: Full freedom up to 24h before departure.
home.flex_text: Reserve now and pay later to secure experiences without locking yourself in early.
home.auth_title: Log in to manage bookings and rewards

about.hero_subtitle: We connect travelers with authentic experiences in Morocco.
about.mission_p1: Every trip should be unique. We connect travelers with local experiences while supporting operators.
about.mission_p2: Quality, authenticity and simple secure booking.
about.value_auth_desc: Experiences that reflect real local culture.
about.value_community_desc: We support local operators and sustainable tourism.
about.value_excellence_desc: The best possible experience for every traveler.
about.cta_text: Traveler or partner — Overglow Trip is for you.

culture.hero_subtitle: Dive into Morocco's cultural richness and authentic traditions
culture.cta_text: Explore immersive experiences at the heart of Moroccan culture.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro_body: Overglow-Trip is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.
privacy.collect_4: Content you publish on our platform
privacy.use_body: We use your information to provide, improve, and personalize our services, process your transactions, and communicate with you.
privacy.share_body: We do not sell your personal information. We may share your information only with operators to facilitate your bookings, or when required by law.
privacy.rights_4: Object to the processing of your data
privacy.security_body: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, loss, or destruction.
privacy.contact_body: For any questions about this privacy policy, please contact us at:
privacy.legal_note: Indicative content — have a qualified legal translator / counsel review before official use.

help.title: Help Center
help.subtitle: How can we help you?
help.guarantees_body: All transactions are secured. Our customer support responds 24/7 for travelers and partners.
help.travelers_2: details, schedules, and cancellation policy visible before payment.
help.partners_1: automated payments according to the payout schedule.
help.partners_2: showcase your activities to travelers interested in Morocco.
help.partners_3: bookings dashboard, statuses, and financial tracking.
help.partners_4: a dedicated team to launch and optimize your offers.
help.contact_body: Send us an email and we will reply within 24 hours.
help.chat_body: Chat with our support team in real time.

Marrakech.name: Marrakech
Marrakech.description: Discover the pearl of southern Morocco with lively souks, historic palaces, and authentic experiences.

Casablanca.name: Casablanca
Casablanca.description: Explore Morocco's economic capital, a mix of modernity and tradition.

Fès.name: Fez
Fès.description: Dive into the world's largest car-free medina, a jewel of Moroccan heritage.

Rabat.name: Rabat
Rabat.description: Visit Morocco's capital, between royal history and a contemporary vibe.

Tanger.name: Tangier
Tanger.description: Africa's gateway to Europe, between the Mediterranean and the Atlantic.

Agadir.name: Agadir
Agadir.description: Sun, beaches, and Sahara gateways for coastal and desert experiences.

partner.title: Become a partner and turn local experiences into revenue.
partner.subtitle: A premium travel-tech platform built for on-the-ground experts in Morocco.
partner.benefit_1: Zero signup fees to launch your activity.
partner.benefit_2: Guaranteed payouts at D+7 for clear cashflow.
partner.benefit_3: Visibility with travelers interested in Morocco.
partner.success: Thank you. Your request is saved — a partner advisor will contact you soon.
partner.toast_ok: Pre-registration sent. Our team will contact you soon.
partner.toast_error: Something went wrong. Please try again shortly.

affiliate.hero_subtitle: Offer your Morocco experiences to passionate travelers and grow your local business.
affiliate.why_subtitle: The platform built for tourism operators in Morocco
affiliate.how_subtitle: In a few simple steps, start selling your experiences
affiliate.step1_body: Create your operator account in minutes. Free and no commitment.
affiliate.step2_body: Complete onboarding and add products with photos and descriptions.
affiliate.step3_body: Once approved, your experiences are visible to travelers interested in Morocco.
affiliate.form_subtitle: Start your journey with Overglow-Trip today
affiliate.accept: By signing up, you agree to our
affiliate.err_password_length: Password must be at least 6 characters
affiliate.benefit_1_body: Reach travelers looking for authentic experiences in Morocco.
affiliate.benefit_2_body: Grow bookings with a showcase dedicated to local operators.
affiliate.benefit_3_body: Secure transactions and reliable payouts for you and your guests.
affiliate.benefit_5_body: A complete tool for products, bookings, and customers.
affiliate.benefit_6_body: A team to support your growth in Morocco.
affiliate.t1_text: Overglow-Trip helped us structure our offers and get more qualified bookings.
affiliate.t2_text: Clear platform, responsive support, and a real focus on the Moroccan market.
affiliate.t3_text: Finally a showcase built for local operators, without unrealistic claims.

payment.aria_card: Pay by credit card with Stripe
payment.paypal_redirect: You will be redirected to PayPal to complete your payment.
payment.cmi_body: You will be redirected to the secure CMI payment gateway to complete your transaction.
payment.cmi_accepts: Accepts all Moroccan bank cards (Visa, Mastercard, CMI)
payment.cash_body: You will pay in cash directly upon arrival at the meeting point.
payment.cash_warning: Please bring the exact amount in cash. Payment will be collected at the meeting point by our team.
payment.delivery_body: Payment will be collected when your booking confirmation is delivered.
payment.delivery_placeholder: Enter your full address (street, city, postal code)...
payment.delivery_warning: A delivery agent will come to your address to collect payment and deliver your booking confirmation.
payment.bank_body: Make a transfer to the account below. Your booking will be confirmed once payment is received.
payment.bank_instructions: IMPORTANT: Include this reference in your transfer description so we can identify your payment.
payment.bank_processing_body: Bank transfers may take 1 to 3 business days. Your booking will be confirmed once the transfer is received.
payment.err_cash: Failed to process on-site cash payment
payment.err_delivery: Failed to process payment on delivery
